daily.today_energy: Mercury's doing its thing and you're feeling that clarity hit different. Your vibe is grounded but curious—perfect for tackling whatever's been on your mind lately. Trust the momentum.
daily.love: Someone's noticing your energy shift and they're into it. Whether you're single or coupled up, authenticity is your love language today. Let people see the real you without the overthinking filter.
daily.career: Your attention to detail is genuinely unmatched rn. That project or task you've been procrastinating on? Today's the day to actually finish it. Your boss is gonna be impressed, not gonna lie.
daily.health: Your body's asking for a little extra rest today—listen to it. Hydrate, move gently, maybe skip the intense workout and do something that feels nourishing instead. Recovery is productive too.

weekly.overview: Mercury's dancing through your sector of introspection, Virgo. This week feels like untangling headphones in your mind—messy but ultimately clarifying. Trust the process, even when things feel scattered.
weekly.love: Venus is whispering something vulnerable into your ear. If you've been holding back, this is your sign to say the thing. Single? Someone's noticing your quiet confidence. Let them in a little.
weekly.career: Your ideas are actually gold right now, even if you're second-guessing them. Stop doom-scrolling through worst-case scenarios and pitch that project. Your attention to detail is exactly what's needed.
weekly.health: Your nervous system needs gentle reset. Skip the productivity grind and lean into rest without guilt. Movement that feels good (not punishing) hits different this week. Your body's asking for ease.
